summary: Phase 9 (HomePage compact layout + ClipDetailPage full-width vote bar) PASSED end-to-end. HomePage: hero-section height=842px (= 78vh on 1080p, down from 100vh), DOM section order verified hero(y=0) → top-three(842) → feed(1406) → how-it-works(2390) → prize-reveal(3208). First upvote-btn now at y=1309 (down from 2140 in iter8) — clips visible above-the-fold on 1080p. hero-title renders 'Bu haftayı kıran klibi seç.' as a single h1 block. Hero CTAs (hero-feed-btn, hero-login-btn) present and clickable. ClipDetailPage: new clip-detail-vote-btn measured w=960px h=64px (full card width, h-16 per spec) — old narrow pill design fully gone. Visible text 'OY VER · 16' (CSS uppercase transform on inner 'Oy Ver') with center-aligned ChevronUp + count. aria-pressed='false' on unvoted state. Anonymous click → toast 'Oy vermek için giriş yap', clip-detail-vote-confirm overlay correctly DOES NOT appear (setShowVotedFlash only fires after successful api.post). Logged-in testuser_phase3 self-vote on own clip (Slotjack demo klip 2) → backend rejects with 403, no voted-flash overlay (gate preserved from Phase 7). Regressions: ClipCard vote-bar from Phase 8 still h=56px w=387px across all 9 cards (3 podium + 6 grid); no legacy pill buttons anywhere on site (aria-label='Oy ver' count=0); /api/stats/community returns {total_members:128, telegram_linked:4, next_position:8} with formula next_position = tg_linked + COMMUNITY_DISPLAY_MULTIPLIER(4); TelegramLinkDialog screenshot confirms '#8'inci kişi sen ol' rendered exactly as backend next_position. Profile page /profil/testuser_phase3 loads with 'En iyi: 16 oy / Bu hafta 2 klip'. Backend smoke: /api root 200, /api/clips 200, /api/stats/community 200, /api/auth/login 200, /api/auth/me 200 — backend completely untouched by frontend reorg, all healthy.
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.jsx (L42-110): hero compact rework is clean — min-h-[78vh] is the right knob, scroll-hint at bottom-6 still works because hero is flex items-center. heroScale/Opacity/Y framer-motion transforms preserved. The pt-24 pb-10 inside the wrapper plus 78vh outer give breathing room without overflow. No layout shift observed when fonts load.

HomePage.jsx (L112-201): section ordering hero → top-three → feed → HowItWorks → PrizeReveal is the correct UX fix. top-three uses pt-12 pb-10 (compact), feed uses pt-8 pb-20. Result: top-three at y=842 sits right under hero on 1080p — Apple-style above-the-fold reveal.

ClipDetailPage.jsx (L137-173): full-width vote button is solid. h-16 (64px) is taller than ClipCard's h-14 (56px) which makes sense for the focal action on a detail page. Voted state: gradient-to-r [#53FC18]→[#5cff1f]→[#42cc13] + Check icon + glow shadow + infinite inset boxShadow pulse (2.4s) — visually distinct and matches spec. Unvoted: bg-white/5 + ChevronUp + hover→[#53FC18]/12. Spring icon swap and count slide-in animations are tasteful.

ClipDetailPage.jsx (L72-98): voted-flash overlay correctly absolute over iframe with z-20, pointer-events-none (does not block underlying iframe clicks after dismissal). 1100ms display via setTimeout — exactly matches the 1.1s spec. setShowVotedFlash is inside try-block AFTER api.post resolves, so 403s (self-vote, no-telegram, anon) correctly do NOT trigger the flash — a subtle but important UX detail done right.

Minor (no action): inner_text returns 'OY VER' (uppercase) because of Tailwind 'uppercase' class. JSX source is 'Oy Ver' — this is a CSS-transform-only effect, expected. Just a note for future test authors: use case-insensitive matches against innerText on uppercase-styled buttons.

Minor (no action): there are some Three.js WebGL 'GPU stall due to ReadPixels' warnings from Hero3D — these are performance hints from the GL driver in the headless test env, not user-visible issues. THREE.Clock deprecation warning is from the three.js library itself, not app code. Both safe to ignore.
server.py still 1132 lines — refactor recommendation from iter7/iter8 still stands but not blocking this iteration.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all Phase 9 assertions (hero height, DOM order, first-clip Y position, vote-btn dimensions+text+aria, anon-toast, no-flash on rejection, ClipCard regression, no legacy pill, tg-counter formula)

test_credentials: testuser_phase3 / sifre123 (no Telegram, 2 demo clips by self). Used existing seeded users — no new accounts created this iteration.
seed_data_creation: None. Reused existing clips: 034b471d (Slotjack demo klip 2, 16 votes, testuser_phase3) and f58a1fe9 (Test by alupen, 0 votes).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 9 verified. Key state going forward: (1) HomePage hero is 78vh — DO NOT raise back to 100vh without UX justification. Section order is now hero → top-three → feed → HowItWorks → PrizeReveal. First clip card upvote-btn at y≈1309 on 1080p — keep below ~1800px for above-the-fold visibility. (2) ClipDetailPage clip-detail-vote-btn is full-width (w-full, ~960px on max-w-5xl) and h-16 (64px). Test must use case-insensitive match against inner_text ('OY VER' due to Tailwind uppercase). data-testids in use: clip-detail-vote-btn, clip-detail-votes, clip-detail-vote-confirm (overlay only on successful new vote). (3) ClipCard from iter8 unchanged: upvote-btn-{id} h=56px w=full-card. (4) community_stats formula unchanged: next_position = telegram_linked + 4. (5) Self-vote 403 + anon click → both correctly suppress the voted-flash overlay (setShowVotedFlash is post-await on api.post, throws skip it).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Phase 9 is a pure frontend layout + design polish iteration; both deliverables (HomePage clips-above-the-fold, ClipDetailPage full-width vote bar) implemented to spec. Backend untouched — confirmed via smoke tests. Phase 8 regressions (ClipCard vote-bar, community counter formula, register flow) all intact. Single test-side hiccup: my initial assertion expected mixed-case 'Oy Ver' in inner_text but Tailwind 'uppercase' class returns 'OY VER' — fixed with case-insensitive comparison on retry; not an app bug.
